title: No Fire
description: Invisible Fire Texturepack for Minecraft CrystalPvP.
body:
Invisible Fire – See the flames? Exactly, you don’t!

This texture pack makes ground fire completely invisible. Perfect for PvP, minigames, or simply if you’re tired of those annoying flames blocking your view.

🔥 Features:

Fully invisible ground fire

No visual distractions

Works with all default-based Minecraft versions
